subcodes.first_line: O co-sharer and partner in 'Abdu'l-Bahá's servitude! Thy letter was received, wherein thou hadst inquired concerning goodwill towards the government [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سهیم و شریک عبودیت عبدالبهاء نامه رسید سوال فرموده بودید که خیرخواهی دولت
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @wisdom [hikmat]
